verdict: Levers STACK additively on RECOGNITION (step-3) but NOT on PLANNING (step-1): banking owns the planning lift, test-time thinking adds ~0 to planning on base OR banked. SCOPE: banking is no-think SFT -> 'thinking adds no planning' is test-time-only; motivates bank-the-thoughts.
caveat: n=40, one seed/budget; base cells inherited from C26 (identical slice/harness). Banked adapter was trained NO-THINK; its thinking channel is intact (traces coherent, median ~2500 chars).
